headline: How The Amgen (AMGN) Story Is Evolving As Rare Disease Upside Meets Valuation Caution
summary: Amgen's fair value estimate has been nudged from US$349.66 to US$352.23 per share, a small move that still matters if you are tracking entry points and valuation ranges. Around that level, analysts are split, with some using higher targets such as US$427 on the back of rare disease and pipeline assets, while others sit closer to US$350 and stress that recent gains already price in a lot of the good news. Read on to see how to interpret these shifting targets and keep up with the evolving...
